---
title: "MADS — Multi-Agent Distributed System"
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: false
    font-paths:
      - fonts
    template-partials:
      - typst-template.typ
      - typst-show.typ
---

```{=typst}
// =====================================================================
//                              PAGE 1
// =====================================================================

// ---- Header ---------------------------------------------------------
#band(fill: mads-orange, top: 12mm, bottom: 9mm)[
  #grid(
    columns: (auto, 1fr),
    align: (left + horizon, right + horizon),
    gutter: 9mm,
    [
      #image("images/logo_white.png", height: 19mm)
      #v(3.5mm)
      #text(font: font-head, size: 15pt, weight: 500, fill: white)[
        Multi-Agent Distributed System
      ]
    ],
    align(right)[
      #box(
        fill: white.transparentize(86%), radius: 7pt,
        inset: (x: 11pt, y: 9pt), stroke: 0.8pt + white.transparentize(45%),
      )[
        #text(font: font-body, size: 10.5pt, fill: white, style: "italic")[
          Connect sensors, devices\ & software into one\ distributed network.
        ]
      ]
      #v(3.5mm)
      #chip("Apache v2.0 · OPEN SOURCE", fg: mads-orange, bg: white)
    ],
  )
]

#accent-stripe()

// ---- What is MADS ---------------------------------------------------
#band(top: 9mm, bottom: 7mm)[
  #kicker("What is MADS?")
  #v(3mm)
  #grid(
    columns: (1.32fr, 1fr),
    gutter: 10mm,
    [
      #text(size: 10pt)[
        *MADS* is a lightweight, cross-platform framework for building
        networks of *distributed agents* that exchange data over
        #text(fill: mads-blue-dark, weight: 600)[ZeroMQ]. Wire up heterogeneous
        sensors, devices and software into one cooperating system — and start
        collecting and processing live data in *about one hour*.
      ]
      #v(3.5mm)
      #text(size: 10pt)[
        Every agent is a *source*, a *filter* or a *sink*. Customize behaviour
        with C++ plugins, or prototype in Python, R and Lua. No heavyweight
        middleware, minimal dependencies, tiny footprint.
      ]
    ],
    box(fill: mads-sky, radius: 9pt, inset: 12pt, width: 100%)[
      #align(center)[
        #grid(columns: 5, align: horizon, column-gutter: 6pt,
          flow-node("SOURCE", mads-blue), flow-arrow,
          flow-node("FILTER", mads-orange), flow-arrow,
          flow-node("SINK", mads-pink),
        )
        #v(8pt)
        #box(width: 100%, fill: mads-ink, radius: 6pt, inset: (x: 10pt, y: 6pt))[
          #text(font: font-head, weight: 600, size: 9.5pt, fill: white)[BROKER]
          #h(6pt)
          #text(font: font-body, size: 7.4pt, fill: white.transparentize(18%))[
            routes every message
          ]
        ]
        #v(6pt)
        #text(font: font-body, size: 7.6pt, style: "italic", fill: mads-ink.lighten(25%))[
          pub / sub · auto-discovery · encrypted
        ]
      ]
    ],
  )
]

// ---- Why MADS -------------------------------------------------------
#band(fill: mads-cloud, top: 8mm, bottom: 8mm)[
  #kicker("Why MADS?")
  #v(4mm)
  #grid(
    columns: (1fr, 1fr, 1fr),
    rows: (auto, auto),
    gutter: 6mm,
    feature("Tiny footprint",
      [\~20 MB installer with minimal dependencies — against \~750 MB for ROS 2.],
      accent: mads-orange),
    feature("Gentle learning curve",
      [Productive in \~1 hour. The whole plugin API is barely 5 methods.],
      accent: mads-blue),
    feature("Runs everywhere",
      [Windows, macOS, Linux — down to small boards like the Raspberry Pi.],
      accent: mads-pink),
    feature("Fast by design",
      [\~150k messages/s (10 kB each) over the binary MsgPack protocol.],
      accent: mads-blue),
    feature("Truly extensible",
      [Native C++/Rust plugins, or full agents scripted in Python, R and Lua.],
      accent: mads-orange),
    feature("Distributed & secure",
      [Over-the-air plugin delivery and optional end-to-end encryption.],
      accent: mads-pink),
  )
]

// ---- Stats band -----------------------------------------------------
#band(fill: mads-blue, top: 6mm, bottom: 6mm)[
  #grid(
    columns: (1fr,) * 5,
    gutter: 4mm,
    stat("20 MB", "installer size"),
    stat([~1 h], "to first network"),
    stat("150k", "msgs / second"),
    stat("5", "methods plugin API"),
    stat([4+], "platforms"),
  )
]

// =====================================================================
//                              PAGE 2
// =====================================================================
#pagebreak()

// ---- Mini header ----------------------------------------------------
#band(fill: mads-ink, top: 10mm, bottom: 8mm)[
  #grid(
    columns: (1fr, auto),
    align: (left + horizon, right + horizon),
    gutter: 8mm,
    [
      #kicker("Connect anything", color: mads-orange-light)
      #v(2mm)
      #text(font: font-head, weight: 700, size: 18pt, fill: white)[
        One network, every interface
      ]
    ],
    image("images/logo_white.png", height: 12mm),
  )
]

#accent-stripe()

// ---- Interfaces -----------------------------------------------------
#let ifgroup(title, color, body) = block(below: 4.2mm, above: 0pt, width: 100%)[
  #grid(
    columns: (30mm, 1fr), gutter: 9pt, align: (right + top, left + top),
    text(font: font-head, weight: 600, size: 9.5pt, fill: color)[#title],
    par(leading: 1.55em)[#body],
  )
]

#band(top: 7mm, bottom: 5mm)[
  #text(size: 9pt, fill: mads-ink.lighten(12%))[
    A minimal core of general-purpose agents, extended by a growing ecosystem
    of plugins and agents at #text(font: font-mono, size: 8.5pt, fill: mads-blue-dark)[github.com/MADS-Net].
  ]
  #v(4.5mm)
  #ifgroup("I/O & devices", mads-blue)[
    #chip("Arduino", bg: mads-blue) #chip("Arduino Uno Q", bg: mads-blue) #chip("Bluetooth LE", bg: mads-blue) #chip("Raspberry Pi GPIO", bg: mads-blue) #chip("Serial", bg: mads-blue)
  ]
  #ifgroup("Languages", mads-orange)[
    #chip("C++ plugins", bg: mads-orange) #chip("Rust plugins", bg: mads-orange)
    #chip("Python agent", bg: mads-orange) #chip("Python library", bg: mads-orange) #chip("R", bg: mads-orange) #chip("Lua", bg: mads-orange) 
  ]
  #ifgroup("AI & simulation", mads-pink)[
    #chip("ONNX models", bg: mads-pink) #chip("FMU / digital twins", bg: mads-pink)
  ]
  #ifgroup("Data & storage", mads-blue)[
    #chip("HDF5", bg: mads-blue) #chip("MongoDB", bg: mads-blue) #chip("CSV replay", bg: mads-blue)
  ]
  #ifgroup("Bridges & UI", mads-orange)[
    #chip("MQTT", bg: mads-orange) #chip("Text-to-speech", bg: mads-orange) #chip("Terminal UI", bg: mads-orange) #chip("Rerun live plots", bg: mads-orange)
  ]
  #ifgroup("Networking", mads-ink)[
    #chip("Federation", bg: mads-ink) #chip("Auto-discovery", bg: mads-ink) #chip("OTA plugins", bg: mads-ink)
  ]
]

// ---- Who's using MADS ----------------------------------------------
#let usecase(place, body, accent: mads-blue) = block(
  fill: white, radius: 7pt, inset: 9pt, stroke: 0.6pt + mads-line,
  width: 100%,
)[
  #text(font: font-head, weight: 600, size: 9.5pt, fill: accent)[#place]
  #v(2.5pt)
  #text(size: 8.2pt, fill: mads-ink.lighten(15%))[#body]
]

#band(fill: mads-sky, top: 7mm, bottom: 7mm)[
  #kicker("Who's using MADS", color: mads-blue)
  #v(4mm)
  #grid(
    columns: (1fr, 1fr),
    gutter: 5mm,
    usecase([University of Trento · MiRO Lab],
      [Software stack of a *robotic walker* for neuro-rehabilitation of patients.],
      accent: mads-orange),
    usecase([University of Brescia · MMTLab],
      [Edge-AI cameras for real-time *3D human pose estimation*.],
      accent: mads-blue),
    usecase([University of Perugia · Measurement Group],
      [Data collection from *wearable sensors* and RFID transponders.],
      accent: mads-pink),
    usecase([INSA Toulouse · Institut Clément Ader],
      [Multi-sensor *energy-efficiency* monitoring on machining shopfloors.],
      accent: mads-blue),
  )
  #v(5mm)
  #block(fill: mads-orange, radius: 7pt, inset: 10pt, width: 100%)[
    #grid(columns: (auto, 1fr), gutter: 9pt, align: (left + horizon, left + horizon),
      text(font: font-head, weight: 700, size: 9.5pt, fill: white)[TEACHING],
      text(size: 8.6pt, fill: white)[
        The new *MASSMa* course (Multi-Agent Systems for Smart Machining) runs
        jointly at the University of Trento and INSA Toulouse under the ECIU umbrella.
      ],
    )
  ]
]

// ---- Get started ----------------------------------------------------
#band(fill: mads-ink, top: 8mm, bottom: 9mm)[
  #grid(
    columns: (1.1fr, 1fr),
    gutter: 12mm,
    [
      #kicker("Get started", color: mads-orange-light)
      #v(4mm)
      #stack(dir: ttb, spacing: 7pt,
        link-item("Get MADS", "git.new/MADS", accent: mads-orange),
        link-item("Docs", "mads-net.github.io", accent: mads-blue),
        link-item("Source", "github.com/pbosetti/mads", accent: mads-orange),
        link-item("Plugins", "github.com/MADS-Net", accent: mads-blue),
        link-item("VS Code", "MADSCode extension", accent: mads-pink),
      )
    ],
    [
      #kicker("Contact", color: mads-orange-light)
      #v(4mm)
      #text(size: 11pt, fill: white)[*Paolo Bosetti*]
      #v(1.5mm)
      #text(size: 8.6pt, fill: white.transparentize(18%))[
        Dept. of Industrial Engineering\
        University of Trento, Italy
      ]
      #v(5mm)
      #text(size: 8pt, fill: white.transparentize(32%), style: "italic")[
        MADS (v2.3 or later) is released under Apache 2.0 —\
        free to use for any application.
      ]
    ],
  )
]
```
